mapper.select: SELECT id, name, sort FROM category WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT id, name, sort, enabled FROM category ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category(name, sort, enabled) VALUES(#{name}, #{sort}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET name=#{name}, sort=#{sort}, enabled=#{enabled} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, sort, enabled FROM category WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO category(name, sort, enabled) VALUES(#{name}, #{sort}, 1)
